query: SELECT p.batchNo, st.id AS taskId, JSON_PRETTY(st.metadata) AS metadata FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND p.batchNo = '01900000047' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT p.batchNo, st.id AS taskId, JSON_PRETTY(st.metadata) AS metadata FROM station_tasks st INNER JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND p.batchNo = '01900000047' LIMIT 1;
